title: 2026 F1 Testing Bahrain Day 3 Analysis - Driver Coach Martin Villari
description:
Day 3 of 2026 Formula 1 pre-season testing in Bahrain is done — and there’s already a lot to unpack. In this video, I break down what actually matters from a driver’s perspective, cutting through lap times and headlines to focus on:
Early car behaviour & balance trends
2026 power unit deployment and energy usage clues
Aero platform stability under braking & mid-corner
What drivers are really learning on Day 1 vs what’s still hidden

title: Barcelona Shakedown EXPLAINED: Every F1 2026 Team’s Real Situation
description:
F1 2026 finally hit the track for real in Barcelona – and the first five days of running have given us a very early look at the new era.

On paper, Lewis Hamilton was fastest of the week for Ferrari with a 1:16.348.

But when you dig into the data, it’s Mercedes – with 500 laps on the W17 – and the power unit manufacturers who really stand out.

In this video, we go team by team through the full Barcelona shakedown:

• What each team actually did on track
• How many laps they completed

description: The competitive success of the Ferrari SF-26 remains to be discovered, and only the race track will ultimately provide definitive answers. title: 2025 F1 ABU DHABI GP Race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: And so it ended.  Max, Oscar and Lando finished one-two-three on the Abu Dhabi road - but it was Lando who was thus ahead in the final standings of the FIA Drivers' World Championship by the margin of two points. Lando Norris = World Champion. Max was magnificent from the pole; Oscar ran hard Pirellis from the start (rather than the Mediums selected by all the other major runners) and, in so doing, applied some pressure on Max for most of the distance; towards the end, though, on old-ish Hards,

title: 2025 F1 Abu Dhabi GP RACE Analysis - Lando Norris Is A World Champion!!!!
description:
2025 F1 Abu Dhabi GP RACE Analysis! Lando Norris is World Champion for Mclaren by 2 points and  Max Verstappen won the race!

Lando Norris is a worthy WDC and drives like Melbourne, Monaco and Brazil tell you as much! During the race it wasn't without controversy!  Was Lando's overtake off-track fair, and was Yuki's driving dirty? Driver Coach Martin Villari Analyses!
